mapper.select:
SELECT id, code, name, category, safety_stock, created_at, updated_at FROM products
code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR category ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY id
SELECT id, code, name, category, safety_stock, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, code, name, category, safety_stock, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products ( code, name, category, safety_stock ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{name}, #{category}, #{safetyStock} )
mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS product_id, p.code, p.name, p.category, p.safety_stock, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN sm.movement_type = 'IN' THEN sm.quantity WHEN sm.movement_type = 'OUT' THEN -sm.quantity ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS stock_quantity FROM products p LEFT JOIN stock_movements sm ON sm.product_id = p.id
p.code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.category ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
GROUP BY p.id, p.code, p.name, p.category, p.safety_stock ORDER BY p.id
